doctors.name: Dr. Alice Smith
doctors.bio: Board-certified cardiologist with 15 years of experience specializing in preventive cardiology and heart failure management.

doctors.name: Dr. Bob Johnson
doctors.bio: Compassionate pediatrician with 10 years of experience. Specializes in childhood immunizations, developmental assessments, and adolescent medicine.

doctors.name: Dr. Clara Lee
doctors.bio: Neurologist specializing in migraines, epilepsy, and neurodegenerative disorders. Over 12 years of clinical and research experience.

doctors.name: Dr. David Kim
doctors.bio: Internal medicine physician with 20 years of experience. Handles routine checkups, chronic disease management, and urgent walk-in consultations.

doctors.name: Dr. Emily Chen
doctors.bio: Orthopedic surgeon specializing in sports injuries, joint replacements, and fracture management. 8 years of surgical experience.

doctors.name: Dr. Frank Patel
doctors.bio: Dermatologist focused on skin cancer screening, acne treatment, and cosmetic procedures. 11 years of practice.

hospital_faq.address: Evergreen Medical Center is located at 123 Care Drive, Springvale. The emergency room is open 24/7.
hospital_faq.visiting_hours: General wards visiting hours are daily from 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM and from 04:00 PM to 07:00 PM. ICU visiting hours are strictly restricted to 11:00 AM to 12:00 PM.
hospital_faq.insurance: We accept major insurance providers: BlueShield, Aetna, Cigna, and HealthFirst. We do not accept Medicare or international insurances directly, but we can provide itemized receipts for self-reimbursement.
hospital_faq.room_rates: General Ward: $150 per night. Semi-Private Room: $300 per night. Private Suite: $600 per night.
hospital_faq.parking: Visitor parking is free for the first 2 hours, then $5/hour up to a daily maximum of $20. Valet parking is available at the Main Entrance for a flat fee of $15.
hospital_faq.contact: For general inquiries, call 555-0199. For emergencies, call 555-0100.
hospital_faq.pharmacy: Our in-house pharmacy is open Monday–Saturday from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM. Prescriptions filled by our doctors can be picked up within 30 minutes.
hospital_faq.emergency: For life-threatening emergencies, please call 911 or come directly to our 24/7 Emergency Room entrance on the east wing.
hospital_faq.cafeteria: The hospital cafeteria is open daily from 7:00 AM to 9:00 PM. Dietary-restricted meals are available upon request for admitted patients.
